hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys,json,subprocess
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin)
    f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
    if 'backend' in f and f.endswith('.py'):
        r=subprocess.run(['python','-m','ruff','check','backend/app/','--quiet','--select','E,W,F,I'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='C:/Users/804/Documents/mywallet_v2')
        out=(r.stdout+r.stderr).strip()[:500]
        if out:
            print(json.dumps({'systemMessage':'[ruff] '+out}))
except:pass
"

python -c "
import sys,json,subprocess
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin)
    f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
    if 'frontend/src' in f and (f.endswith('.ts') or f.endswith('.tsx')):
        r=subprocess.run(['npx','tsc','--noEmit'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='C:/Users/804/Documents/mywallet_v2/frontend',timeout=30)
        out=(r.stdout+r.stderr).strip()[:600]
        if out:
            print(json.dumps({'systemMessage':'[tsc] '+out[:400]+'...' if len(out)>400 else '[tsc] '+out}))
except:pass
"
